text.title: WireGuard VPN Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply WireGuard VPN end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: allocate-subnet
step.action: Pick a /24 not colliding with home LAN (e.g. 10.66.66.0/24).

step.name: generate-server-keys
step.action: wg genkey | tee privatekey | wg pubkey > publickey; chmod 600.

step.name: render-server-config
step.action: Render wg0-server.conf with PostUp NAT, AllowedIPs per peer.

step.name: enable-forwarding
step.decision-gate: If ip_forward stays 0 after sysctl --system, abort — investigate kernel.

step.name: add-first-peer
step.action: Run add-wg-peer.sh → server gets [Peer] block, client gets .conf.
